Dear Officer:

This letter is written in support of Ms. Priya Chaudhary's immigration petition. As a General Partner at Zenith Ventures, I have had the opportunity to work closely with Ms. Chaudhary and am well-acquainted with her remarkable capabilities and contributions in the field of cybersecurity for generative AI applications.

Zenith Ventures is an early-stage venture capital fund based in Los Angeles, specializing in leading pre-seed and seed-stage technology startups. Since our inception, we have focused on partnering with exceptional founders to drive innovation in the enterprise and B2B sectors, particularly in areas such as fintech infrastructure, privacy, security, and automation. Our typical initial investments range from $1 million to $3 million, reflecting our commitment to supporting transformative ideas from their earliest stages.

Our portfolio includes companies that have made significant strides in their respective fields. For instance, InfoLumina, a cloud-based platform for building, scaling, and governing data and AI, has reached a valuation of approximately $43 billion. Luna, a blockchain platform with smart contract functionality, is valued at around $7 billion. Cortex, which develops chips for faster generative AI model building, has a valuation of approximately $2.8 billion. These successes underscore our ability to identify and nurture potential in diverse technology sectors.

At Zenith Ventures, we focus heavily on founder-market-fit - This is the alignment of the founder's skills, experience, and passion with the needs of the target market. Ms. Chaudhary has great founder market fit to build in cybersecurity. She has engineering experience from Logiciel Labs where she has built large scale systems, and the cybersecurity skillset that is important to build in this niche space. We have seen that successful founders building the best next-generation companies often come from working in the best-in-class current generation companies. Her experience as a Sr. Product Manager at Aurora Networks is of great value here.

Our firm has been highly selective in its investment approach, typically investing in less than 1% of the companies that seek our funding. This rigorous selection process ensures that we only partner with the most promising and innovative startups. Our portfolio spans a wide range of industries, including developer tools, API platforms, and fintech. Notably, we have been lead seed investors in successful companies such as SwiftNotes, Nexta, and Messenger Hut. SwiftNotes, for instance, was named Aria's tablet app of the year and has achieved 19 million monthly active users. These successes highlight our ability to identify and support transformative ideas across diverse technology sectors.

Our decision to invest in Horizon Security was driven by Ms. Chaudhary's outstanding capabilities and the company's innovative approach to addressing critical security challenges. As the CEO and co-founder of Horizon Security (Shield Systems Inc), Ms. Chaudhary plays a crucial role in ensuring the company's success and making our investment fruitful. She oversees all company functions, including engineering, sales, customer success, and marketing. Ms. Chaudhary is truly "where the buck stops" regarding responsibility for any operation within the company.

Horizon Security is poised to transform how enterprises adopt generative AI technologies. This venture has the potential to employ thousands of Americans while addressing a critical issue that affects the country's security posture. Ms. Chaudhary stands out as a top product expert uniquely positioned to build a large company in this domain and her continued presence in the USA is crucial to the company's success.

Beyond her role at Horizon Security, Ms. Chaudhary has demonstrated her expertise and leadership in the field of cybersecurity through her significant contributions to the industry. Her extensive experience and deep understanding of the cybersecurity landscape have made her a sought-after expert and advisor.

Ms. Chaudhary's professional journey includes notable roles at leading technology companies. At Aurora Networks, she served as a Senior Product Manager for Data Loss Prevention (DLP), where she was responsible for a $50M+ ARR product with a mature install base of large enterprises. Her efforts doubled the business to $100M+ in two years, supporting top enterprise and government clients in deriving value from the product. She also played a key role in integrating delta.ai, a $36M acquisition, into the DLP product, bringing new real-time integrations and advanced detection capabilities.

At GuardSoft, Ms. Chaudhary held the position of Senior Product Manager for Runtime Security, where she achieved over 30% ARR growth by revamping the product strategy and reversing a negative trend. She conceptualized and launched an award-winning serverless security product, pioneering GuardSoft's entry into Cloud Native Protection. Her strategic vision and execution were instrumental in the company's growth and innovation.

Ms. Chaudhary's technical foundation was built during her tenure at Logiciel Labs, where she worked as a Software Development Engineer. She led product enhancements for Logiciel Advertising Cloud, a portfolio optimization platform for digital ads, and developed key features that significantly improved the platform's performance and usability. Her contributions to Logiciel laid the groundwork for her future successes in product management and cybersecurity.

Ms. Chaudhary's academic background further complements her professional achievements. She holds a Master's degree in System Design and Management from the California Institute of Technology (CalTech), where she gained a strong interdisciplinary foundation in engineering and management. This educational experience has been invaluable in her ability to lead and innovate in the complex field of cybersecurity.

In addition to her corporate roles, Ms. Chaudhary has been actively involved in the startup ecosystem. As a co-founder and Director of Products at DataHack Inc., she demonstrated her entrepreneurial spirit and ability to drive product innovation from the ground up. Her diverse experiences across different roles and companies have equipped her with a unique perspective and skill set that she brings to her current venture, Horizon Security.

Ms. Chaudhary's extensive experience, technical expertise, and proven leadership make her an invaluable asset to the cybersecurity industry. Her ability to drive innovation, lead teams, and deliver results has been consistently demonstrated throughout her career. Her continued presence and contributions in the United States are crucial to the success of Horizon Security and the broader industry.

In conclusion, Ms. Priya Chaudhary's extensive experience, technical expertise, and proven leadership make her an invaluable asset to the cybersecurity industry. Her ability to drive innovation, lead teams, and deliver results has been consistently demonstrated throughout her career. Her continued presence and contributions in the United States are crucial to the success of Horizon Security and the broader industry. I offer my strongest recommendation for Ms. Chaudhary's immigration to the USA. Her presence will undoubtedly benefit the American technology landscape and contribute to the advancement of cybersecurity solutions.

Please do not hesitate to contact me on the email address below for any questions on this matter.

Sincerely,

Alex Morgan

General Partner

Zenith Ventures

final text:
Dear USCIS Officer

It is my pleasure to write this letter of recommendation on behalf of Mr. Aditya Patel, an entrepreneur and product manager of extraordinary ability in the field of emerging technologies.

I am a seasoned Intellectual Property Consultant, Registered Patent Attorney, and Founding Partner of Innoventia Advisors with over 16 years of experience in patents, technology transfer, and commercialization. I specialize in patent drafting, infringement analysis, IP portfolio management, freedom-to-operate (FTO) opinions, and licensing agreements, with expertise spanning mechanical, biotechnology, bioinformatics, pharmaceuticals, computational sciences, and electronics. I have successfully handled national and international patent filings under PCT, conducted IP due diligence, and advised businesses, startups, and researchers on IP protection, commercialization strategies, and litigation support. My experience includes working as a Scientist at NPLI’s IPMD, focusing on patent drafting, searching, and filing, as well as leading awareness seminars and workshops on intellectual property rights.

I have had the opportunity to work closely with Mr. Patel on the patenting of his innovative carbon capture technology. Through this collaboration, I have gained a deep understanding of his extraordinary abilities and contributions to the field.

As the Founder and CEO of Veridian Labs, a pioneering deeptech startup focused on addressing the critical challenge of reducing carbon emissions, Mr. Aditya Patel has demonstrated extraordinary leadership and innovation. Under his stewardship, Veridian Labs has successfully developed and implemented cutting-edge carbon capture technology, which exemplifies his commitment to driving technological advancement in climate solutions.

One of the flagship achievements under Mr. Patel's leadership is the development of a compact carbon capture system that achieves a remarkable 1 ton/day CO2 capture capacity, reducing costs by 40% compared to industry standards. This system employs a novel sorbent formulation, enhancing absorption efficiency by 40%. The technology has not only been successfully demonstrated in laboratory settings but also in practical applications through end-to-end carbon mineralization in concrete. This breakthrough positions Veridian Labs as a leader in the application of carbon capture in construction materials, a critical step towards sustainable development.

In addition to carbon capture, Mr. Patel spearheaded the innovation of a thermal energy storage system, capable of storing thermal energy at 1200°C in engineered alumina blocks, with an impressive 100KWh capacity and an 85% round-trip efficiency. This energy storage system is revolutionary for its efficiency and compact design and is currently undergoing validation across multiple industrial sites, showcasing its viability and scalability.

Central to Mr. Patel’s contributions is his work on patenting innovations that mark significant advancements in CO2 capture technologies. Notably, he is the inventor behind the patent application number 302522205747, titled “Method for Separation of Lewis Acid Gas using Centrifugal Electro-Mechanical System.” This patent, filed in India, underscores his original contribution to the field and provides a rigorous framework for separating CO2 from gas mixtures using novel mechanical processes. This patent is among the key evidence of Mr. Patel's innovative capabilities, demonstrating a direct impact on enhancing the efficiency and feasibility of carbon capture technologies.

The patent, filed under the entity Veridian Innovations Pvt. Her experiences at Zenith solidified her groundwork for future successes in the industry, highlighting her potential as a leader and innovator in marketing.

Her rapid ascension to such a pivotal role highlights her remarkable leadership potential and expertise in the field. To Whom it May Concern:

I am writing this letter to provide my strongest recommendation for Mr. Ravi Malhotra as an individual of extraordinary ability in the field of user experience design, particularly in the areas of voice interfaces and AI-driven music technology. As a General Manager I, Voice & Multimodal UX at Zenith Labs in New Delhi, I have had the privilege of working closely with Mr. Malhotra and witnessing firsthand his remarkable talents and contributions.

By way of background, I have over 10 years of experience leading teams and working hands-on to craft user experiences that enable people to embrace technology with ease. My extensive project-domain experience spans a wide range of areas, including voice interfaces, AI agents, 3D technology, IoT, connected cars, desktop applications, mobile applications, advertising, and packaging design. I have a strong visual sense and a mindset to explore the underlying technology of anything I am involved in or interested in.

At Zenith Labs, I have held various roles, including Senior Chief Designer, Chief Designer, Lead UX Designer, and Senior Designer. In these positions, I have managed and led design teams across multiple domains, such as voice UX for smart homes and Zenith devices, 3D technology applications, and multimedia content creation tools. I have also worked on projects related to IoT, connected cars, and mobile applications. My experience in advertising and packaging design further complements my expertise in user experience design.

Before joining Zenith, I worked as a Designer at Orbit Communications, where I focused on advertising, brand strategy, and design. I also gained experience in architecture through roles as a Jr. Architect at Omega Builders Ltd and an Architect Trainee at Sharma and Associates. My educational background includes a Master of Design in Visual Communication from the National Institute of Design, Ahmedabad, and a Bachelor of Architecture from the School of Architecture, Govt. Engineering College, Kochi. Additionally, I completed a "Design Innovation Made in Germany" scholarship program at AUTO.Design, Technische Universität München, specializing in brand strategy, design innovation, and German design.

Throughout my career, I have developed a wide array of skills relevant to user experience design, including user interface design, graphic design, interaction design, product design, visual design, design strategy, and design thinking. I am also multilingual, fluent in English, Hindi, German, and Malayalam, which has been beneficial for working in international environments and diverse teams.

I have had the pleasure of working closely with Mr. Ravi Malhotra during his tenure at Zenith Corp, where he served as both a Lead Designer and a Senior Designer from August 2014 to March 2017. Throughout this period, I had the opportunity to witness firsthand Mr. Malhotra's remarkable talents and contributions to the field of user experience design, particularly in the areas of voice interfaces and AI-driven music technology.

As a Lead Designer in the research and innovation division of Zenith, Mr. Malhotra worked on several groundbreaking projects that showcased his extraordinary abilities. One of his most notable contributions was to Zenith's AI-based voice interface, Voca. Voice agents are considered the next era in device interaction, and Zenith envisioned creating a voice agent that was not only intelligent but also connected the entire Zenith ecosystem. Mr. Malhotra played a crucial role in this project by designing the personality and UX principles of Voca, identifying major use-cases, and collaborating with field experts on interaction design. His efforts were instrumental in the successful launch of Voca, which now boasts over 10 million daily active users and is available across all Zenith products.

In addition to his work on Voca, Mr. Malhotra also contributed to other innovative projects at Zenith. As a Senior Designer, he focused on the interaction paradigm of hearables, designing voice assistant-enabled wireless headphones based on user research. His work was commercialized into Zenith's flagship device, the Wave Sound X. Furthermore, he designed an IoT-enabled sociable robot, concentrating on personality, out-of-box experience (OOBE), adaptiveness, and multi-user scenarios. His contributions to this project resulted in a pending patent. Mr. Malhotra also developed UX guidelines and identified key scenarios for a foldable smartphone, showcasing his versatility and forward-thinking approach to design.

Mr. Malhotra's ability to blend technical expertise with creative vision is truly remarkable. He consistently pushed the boundaries of what is possible, driving innovation and setting new standards in user experience design. His work at Zenith not only demonstrated his extraordinary abilities but also had a lasting impact on the company's product offerings and user interactions.

Beyond his technical skills, Mr. Malhotra's leadership and collaborative spirit were evident in every project he undertook. He worked seamlessly with cross-functional teams, including engineers, product managers, and other designers, to bring complex ideas to life. His ability to communicate effectively and inspire those around him made him a valuable asset to any team.

Mr. Malhotra's contributions to Zenith were recognized through several patents filed during his tenure. These patents, which cover various aspects of voice interfaces and user interactions, underscore his innovative thinking and technical prowess. His work not only advanced Zenith's product offerings but also contributed to the broader field of user experience design.

Since his time at Zenith, Mr. Malhotra has continued to build on his impressive track record, taking on roles that further showcase his extraordinary abilities. As a UX Designer at Visionary Tech in Stockholm, Sweden, from August 2017 to December 2019, he designed eye-tracking based interactions for dual-display devices like Intel Quantum and Asus VisionPad. He also identified opportunities in eye-tracking based AR interactions, prototyped them, and filed four patents, earning the title of top innovator of Q1 2019. Additionally, he researched, conceptualized, and designed interactions for smartphones with eye-tracking and identified opportunities in eye-tracking based and visually aware voice assistants.

Following his tenure at Visionary Tech, Mr. Malhotra joined Melody HQ in Stockholm, Sweden, where he served as a Product Manager from January 2020 to May 2023. In this role, he led product strategy, roadmap, vision, and execution within Melody's music creation business unit, Soundwave. Working with a cross-functional team of engineers, designers, researchers, and data scientists, he built music creation experiences that significantly enhanced the platform. Mr. Malhotra transformed Soundwave into a real-time collaboration app, leading to a fourfold increase in studio collaboration time. He also crafted a product strategy to help Gen Z users achieve easier and contextual communication by building the "Comments" experience, which increased user interaction with communication features by approximately 40%.

Most recently, Mr. Malhotra has taken on the role of Founder and CEO of Harmony AI, a state-of-the-art AI content creation platform that allows users to create music and podcasts with ease. Harmony uses generative AI to help users brainstorm and translate their stories into musical reality. The platform is on a mission to democratize music creation for aspiring creators, offering tools such as Text to Music, Lyrics Writing, and Stem Separation to help users realize their content dreams more quickly. Harmony has garnered significant attention and praise from various media outlets. Innovators Today highlighted how the platform empowers creators to craft music and podcasts easily, removing typical barriers such as cost, complexity, and time. Musical Insights recognized Harmony as the latest generative AI tool for making music, noting its user-friendly design and advanced technology. British Daily featured Harmony's AI voice assistant, HARMONIA, which simplifies music production by recognizing voice commands and learning user preferences. The Times of New Delhi listed Harmony as one of the top emerging companies in India for 2024, applauding its innovative approach to music creation. Audible News and The Urban Post also praised Harmony for redefining music composition through AI brilliance and pioneering effortless music production, respectively.

Mr. Malhotra's journey from Zenith to Harmony AI showcases his extraordinary ability to innovate and lead in the fields of user experience design and AI-driven music technology. His impressive track record of achievements, coupled with his leadership and collaborative spirit, makes him a valuable asset to any organization. I have no doubt that Mr. Malhotra will continue to make significant contributions to the field and inspire those around him with his vision and dedication.

In conclusion, Mr. Ravi Malhotra is an individual of extraordinary ability in the field of user experience design, particularly in the areas of voice interfaces and AI-driven music technology. His impressive track record of achievements, innovative thinking, and leadership skills make him a valuable asset to any organization. I have no doubt that Mr. Malhotra will continue to make significant contributions to the field and inspire those around him with his vision and dedication. It is with great confidence that I provide my highest recommendation for Mr. Ravi Malhotra.

Sincerely,

Samir Jalan

General Manager I, Voice & Multimodal UX

Zenith Labs, New Delhi

I am writing to provide my strongest recommendation for Mr. Rajesh Patel, an extraordinary entrepreneur and product manager in the field of emerging technologies, particularly in climate tech, fintech, and AI. I have had the privilege of working closely with Mr. Patel through his involvement with the Hudson Center for Entrepreneurship at FIU School of Business, where I serve as the Associate Director.

As the Associate Director of the Hudson Center for Entrepreneurship at FIU School of Business, I oversee various programs and initiatives aimed at fostering entrepreneurship and innovation among students and alumni. Our center is dedicated to providing resources, mentorship, and opportunities for aspiring entrepreneurs to develop their ideas and launch successful ventures. We offer a range of programs, including the FIU Venture Fellows, the FIU Venture Competition, and the FIU Venture Studio, which provide funding, mentorship, and access to a network of successful entrepreneurs and investors.

In my role, I have had the opportunity to work with numerous talented individuals and witness firsthand the qualities that make a successful entrepreneur. Mr. Patel stands out among his peers for his exceptional technical expertise, innovative thinking, and entrepreneurial achievements. His work as the Founder and CEO of Quasar Innovate, a deeptech startup focused on reducing industrial carbon emissions, has been particularly impressive. Mr. Patel's ability to develop cutting-edge technology and secure partnerships with industry giants such as Bharat Petrochemical and S&S Enterprises demonstrates his remarkable capabilities.

Mr. Patel's technical skills are truly outstanding. His proficiency in Python, SQL, Flask, machine learning, data science, Azure, microcontrollers, sensors, actuators, and CAD modeling is evident in his ability to develop advanced technology solutions. His work at Quasar Innovate, where he has pioneered a 1 Ton Per Day Carbon Capture Plant that is 55% more cost-effective than traditional methods, showcases his deep understanding of complex engineering principles and his ability to apply them to real-world challenges. This innovative solution has attracted significant attention and interest from major industrial players, underscoring the impact of his work.

In addition to his technical expertise, Mr. Patel possesses a unique blend of non-technical skills that are crucial for any successful entrepreneur. His experience in product management, corporate partnerships, fundraising, team building, and public speaking has been instrumental in driving the growth and success of his ventures. At Quasar Innovate, he has demonstrated remarkable leadership by building a talented team, securing key partnerships, and effectively communicating the value of his technology to stakeholders. His ability to navigate the complex landscape of startup growth and development is a testament to his versatility and competence as an entrepreneur.

Mr. Patel's achievements extend beyond his current role at Quasar Innovate. His previous experiences as a Product Manager at DigitalWorks, Horizon Health, and EduPath highlight his versatility and ability to drive product success across different industries. At DigitalWorks, he contributed to the development of core technologies, while at Horizon Health and EduPath, he played a pivotal role in scaling health-tech and education-tech products, respectively. These experiences have equipped him with a diverse skill set and a deep understanding of various market dynamics, further enhancing his ability to lead and innovate in his current venture.

Moreover, Mr. Patel's entrepreneurial journey is marked by a series of notable achievements and recognitions. He has been honored with several awards, including the Rising Innovators' Award and the GlobalTech Fellowship. These accolades, awarded by reputable organizations, underscore his intellectual capabilities and innovative thinking. Additionally, his research contributions in fields such as climate tech, energy, 3D printing, and robotics highlight his commitment to advancing knowledge and developing solutions to pressing global challenges. His ability to consistently deliver high-quality work and make meaningful contributions to his field is truly commendable.

In conclusion, Mr. Rajesh Patel is an extraordinary entrepreneur and product manager whose technical expertise, innovative thinking, and remarkable achievements set him apart from his peers. His work at Quasar Innovate, where he has developed groundbreaking carbon capture technology and secured partnerships with major industrial players, demonstrates his ability to drive impactful change in the field of climate tech. His diverse skill set, extensive experience, and impressive track record of success make him an invaluable asset to any organization. I have no doubt that Mr. Patel will continue to make significant contributions to the field of emerging technologies and drive meaningful progress in the fight against climate change. I wholeheartedly recommend Mr. Patel for any opportunity he seeks to pursue.

Sincerely,

Emily Davis

Associate Director

Hudson Center for Entrepreneurship

FIU School of Business

emily.davis@fiu.edu
final text:
Dear Sir or Madam,

I am writing this letter to wholeheartedly recommend Mr. Rajesh Patel. I have had the privilege of working closely with him through his involvement with the Hudson Center for Entrepreneurship at FIU School of Business. I can attest that he is an exceptional entrepreneur and product manager in the field of emerging technologies, particularly in climate tech, fintech, and AI.

To provide some context, I have built a career at the intersection of entrepreneurship, communications, and education. Currently serving as the Associate Director at FIU's Hudson Center for Entrepreneurship, I have dedicated nearly seven years to fostering innovation and supporting entrepreneurial ventures within the academic ecosystem. My experience spans roles in academia and business communications, including serving as a Course Associate at Columbia University and an Account Intern at J&A Business Communications. My expertise spans program development, stakeholder engagement, and strategic communication, with a passion for fostering innovation and guiding entrepreneurs toward success.

Within this role, I have had the opportunity to work with numerous talented individuals and witness firsthand the qualities that make a successful entrepreneur. Mr. Patel stands out among his peers for his exceptional technical expertise, innovative thinking, and entrepreneurial achievements. His work as the Founder and CEO of Quasar Innovate, a deeptech startup focused on reducing industrial carbon emissions, has been particularly impressive. Mr. Patel's ability to develop cutting-edge technology and secure partnerships with industry giants such as Bharat Petrochemical and S&S Enterprises demonstrates his remarkable capabilities.

At Quasar Innovate, Mr. Rajesh Patel has been pivotal in advancing the company's innovative mission to address industrial carbon emissions through advanced technology. As the Founder, CEO, and Product Manager, he has spearheaded the development of patented, low-cost, and compact carbon capture and utilization technology. This novel solution offers a 45% reduction in both capital and operational expenditures, along with a remarkable 70% size reduction compared to traditional MEA-based carbon capture methods. This innovation highlights Mr. Patel’s deep understanding of complex engineering principles and his ability to transform advanced research into practical, scalable solutions for reducing carbon footprints. His commitment to aiding industrial emitters in the fight against global climate change effects, by making carbon capture accessible and profitable, underscores his visionary leadership and innovative approach.

Moreover, Mr. Patel's strategic leadership extends beyond his technical achievements. He has demonstrated exceptional skills in establishing key alliances and expanding Quasar Innovate’s market presence. His adept business development skills have resulted in successful partnerships with prominent industrial entities such as Bharat Petrochemical Limited, a government-owned company with a USD 22 billion market cap, Larsen & Toubro, a leading Indian construction conglomerate, and Kalizka Construction, a key player in plant construction in India. These collaborations highlight his ability to navigate complex corporate environments and his strategic vision in aligning mutual objectives for shared advancement. Mr. Patel's efforts have significantly reinforced Quasar Innovate's reputation as a leader in climate technology, setting a strong foundation for future growth and innovation in the industry.

Furthermore, Mr. Rajesh Patel's expertise in the field of emerging technologies and his contributions as an entrepreneur have garnered significant recognition in the field. His invitations to serve as a judge and reviewer in prestigious events and panels underscore this acknowledgment. His role as a judge at the GreenTech Open Focused Clinics and the IIT Delhi Startup Review Panel highlights his deep insight and understanding of climate technology and startup dynamics. This selection underscores the trust placed in his judgment and the recognition of his ability to identify innovative and impactful solutions.

In addition to these roles, Mr. Patel has been invited to judge at the Tech India Hackathon 2024, organized by the Government of India’s Ministry of Education. This event, known for being one of the largest hackathons aimed at fostering innovation among the youth, benefits greatly from his expertise. His participation at Synergy Ventures Deeptech Startup Review Events and ICG Innovate'24 further emphasizes his standing as a key figure in supporting and evaluating cutting-edge technological ventures. His role as a reviewer at Elsevier's Journal Heliyon further illustrates his academic and professional credibility, entrusted with assessing research quality and relevance. These judging roles are critical, as they shape the trajectory of innovation and entrepreneurship in their respective fields, and Mr. Patel’s involvement is a testament to his influence and respect as an expert.

Mr. Rajesh Patel's engagement with prestigious networks such as the Entrepreneur Forge Membership, GreenTech Open Network, GlobalTech Hero Network, and ODF Fellowship is indicative of his exceptional expertise and standing in the field of emerging technologies. These programs are highly selective, accepting only the most promising and accomplished individuals who demonstrate a profound potential for innovation and leadership. Entrepreneur Forge, for instance, is renowned for its rigorous selection process, identifying and nurturing the most talented entrepreneurs who are poised to build impactful startups. Being part of this network underscores Mr. Patel's entrepreneurial acumen and his potential to drive significant change in the industry. Similarly, the GreenTech Open Network is a leading accelerator focused on clean technology, and admission into this program is reserved for those with groundbreaking ideas and the capacity to implement them successfully. Mr. Patel's involvement highlights his innovative contributions to the field and his commitment to sustainable solutions. The GlobalTech Hero Network and ODF Fellowship also uphold stringent criteria for acceptance, seeking individuals who have demonstrated exceptional creativity, leadership, and a track record of success in their respective domains. Mr. Patel's inclusion in these exclusive networks reflects his dedication to advancing his expertise and contributing to the broader entrepreneurial ecosystem.

Lastly, Mr. Rajesh Patel's expertise as a product manager and entrepreneur in the field of emerging technology has earned him numerous accolades. His innovative approach and contributions have been acknowledged by the Government of India’s Department of Science & Technology (DST) through the prestigious NIDHI PRAYAS Grant via Innovate Bharat. This grant supports promising innovations and underlines Mr. Patel’s potential to drive impactful change. Additionally, he was honored with the Rising Innovators Award by the Global Achievement Federation, recognizing his significant contributions and accomplishments at an early stage in his career. Furthermore, Mr. Patel's outstanding leadership and pioneering work earned him a spot on WorldTech's 30under30 list, cementing his reputation as one of the top young talents in the industry. These awards are a testament to his exceptional skills, dedication, and influence in advancing technology solutions that address pressing global challenges.

In summary, Mr. Rajesh Patel is a remarkable figure in the realm of emerging technologies. His technical skills, visionary leadership, and strategic acumen have propelled Quasar Innovate to the forefront of climate technology innovation. Beyond his technical achievements, his respected role as a judge, memberships in prestigious networks, and numerous accolades speak volumes of his expertise and impact in the industry. I am confident that he will continue to be a catalyst for positive change and innovation in the future. I wholeheartedly recommend Mr. Patel for any opportunities he seeks to pursue and am certain that he will make significant and lasting contributions wherever he goes.

Should you require any additional details or further clarification, please feel free to reach out to me.

Yours truly ,


Emily Davis
Associate Director
Hudson Center for Entrepreneurship
FIU School of Business

Dear Officer:

I am writing to provide my strongest recommendation of Mr. Rajiv Mehra in support of his O-1 visa petition. Mr. Mehra is an extraordinary entrepreneur and product manager in the field of AI music technology and multisensory user experiences. His groundbreaking work in these domains has earned him a reputation as a leading innovator and visionary, whose contributions have had a significant impact on the industry.

As an AR Experience Prototyper in the Vision Products Group at Pear Inc., I have extensive experience in defining and refining user experiences for emerging technologies. I build prototypes to test theories and collaborate with hardware teams to turn these into real products that ship. My role involves working on cutting-edge augmented reality (AR) projects and pushing the boundaries of what is possible in this field.

Prior to joining Pear Inc., I held several key roles at other leading technology companies. At Transition Corp (formerly ConnectBook), I served as a Senior Audio Experience Prototyper in the Reality Initiative Research division. There, I worked on prototyping audio experiences for AR and VR, helping to transform research into actual products. My work involved collaborating with cross-functional teams to develop innovative solutions that enhance the user experience in immersive environments.

Before my tenure at Transition Corp, I was an Interaction Designer at OptiGaze, where I focused on designing and implementing new eye-tracking interactions for AR/VR headsets. My contributions included adding features to the Unity SDK and creating tech demos to promote the adoption of eye-tracking technology. This experience allowed me to hone my skills in user experience design and human-computer interaction, which are critical to my current role at Pear Inc.

Earlier in my career, I worked at MicroWare in various capacities. As a Hardware Prototyper, I built rapid prototypes to test new ideas and concepts. In my role as a VisiLens Audio Experience Prototyper, I developed the first Spatial Sound engine for VisiLens and contributed to MicroWare's Spatial Sound plugins for Unity and Wwise. These experiences provided me with a strong foundation in both hardware and software development, as well as a deep understanding of spatial computing.

My educational background includes a Master of Fine Arts (MFA) in Theatre/Theater (Sound Design) from UC Los Angeles and a Bachelor of Science (BS) in Computer Science with minors in Theatre Technology & Design and Physics from Carleton University. This interdisciplinary education has equipped me with a unique blend of technical and creative skills that I leverage in my work as an AR Experience Prototyper.

Throughout my career, I have developed a wide range of technical and creative skills, including user experience (UX) design, human-computer interaction, sound design, and programming in various languages such as C++, Java, and JavaScript. I am also proficient in tools and frameworks like Unity, MaxMSP, Pure Data, and FMOD. These skills, combined with my extensive experience in leading-edge technology companies, have enabled me to contribute to the development of pioneering technology solutions and to mentor others in the field.

I had the privilege of working closely with Mr. Mehra during our time together at OptiGaze, a leading eye-tracking technology company. As a UX Designer at OptiGaze from August 2017 to December 2019, Mr. Mehra played a pivotal role in designing and implementing innovative eye-tracking interactions for AR/VR platforms. His work was instrumental in advancing OptiGaze's technology and positioning the company as a leader in the field.

During his tenure at OptiGaze, Mr. Mehra focused on designing eye-tracking-based interactions for dual-display devices like the Intel Starburst and Acer StreamBoard. His work in this area was groundbreaking, as he developed intuitive and user-friendly interfaces that enhanced the usability and functionality of these devices. By leveraging eye-tracking technology, he was able to create seamless and natural interactions that significantly improved the user experience.

In addition to his work on dual-display devices, Mr. Mehra also conducted extensive research on eye-tracking-based AR interactions. He identified numerous opportunities to integrate eye-tracking technology into AR applications and developed prototypes to demonstrate their potential. His innovative ideas and designs led to the filing of four patents, underscoring his contributions to the field and his commitment to pushing the boundaries of what is possible with eye-tracking technology.

Mr. Mehra's expertise extended to designing eye-tracking interactions for smartphones as well. He conducted thorough research, conceptualized new interaction paradigms, and designed intuitive interfaces that leveraged eye-tracking to enhance the user experience on mobile devices. His work in this area demonstrated his versatility and ability to apply his skills across different platforms and devices.

Furthermore, Mr. Mehra explored the potential of eye-tracking technology in the realm of voice assistants. He identified opportunities to create visually aware voice assistants that could leverage eye-tracking data to provide more contextually relevant and personalized interactions. His designs and prototypes showcased the potential of combining eye-tracking with voice technology to create more intelligent and responsive digital assistants.

Throughout his time at OptiGaze, Mr. Mehra consistently demonstrated a high level of creativity, technical expertise, and a strong commitment to innovation. His ability to think outside the box and develop groundbreaking solutions was truly impressive. His contributions were recognized by the company, as he was awarded the title of "Top Innovator" for Q1 2019.

Mr. Mehra's work at OptiGaze not only advanced the company's technology but also had a significant impact on the broader field of eye-tracking and AR/VR interactions. His innovative designs and prototypes have paved the way for new applications and use cases, and his patents stand as a testament to his contributions to the industry.

Beyond his technical skills and innovative mindset, Mr. Mehra also demonstrated excellent collaboration and communication abilities. He worked effectively with cross-functional teams, including engineers, researchers, and product managers, to bring his ideas to life. His ability to articulate complex concepts and present his work to both technical and non-technical audiences was a key factor in his success at OptiGaze.

Since his time at OptiGaze, Mr. Mehra has continued to build on his impressive track record of innovation and leadership. He went on to work at Streamify, where he served as a Product Manager from January 2020 to May 2023. In this role, he led the product strategy, roadmap, vision, and execution within Streamify's music creation business unit, SoundChain. His work involved collaborating with a cross-functional team of engineers, designers, researchers, and data scientists to build cutting-edge music creation experiences.

One of Mr. Mehra's notable achievements at Streamify was transforming SoundChain into a real-time collaboration app, which led to a fourfold increase in studio collaboration time. He also developed a product strategy to enhance communication among Gen Z users by building a "Chat Threads" feature. This initiative resulted in a 40% increase in user interactions with communication features, including video and chat, and garnered significant media attention, reaching 110 million impressions.

Mr. Mehra's tenure at Streamify further solidified his reputation as a visionary product leader who excels at driving innovation and delivering impactful solutions. His ability to lead cross-functional teams and develop user-centric products has been a consistent theme throughout his career.

Currently, Mr. Mehra is the Founder and CEO of Sonic AI, a company he established in June 2023. Sonic AI is a state-of-the-art AI content creation platform that enables users to create music and podcasts with ease. The platform leverages generative AI to help users brainstorm and translate their stories into musical realities. Sonic AI has already garnered significant attention, with over 1 million songs generated by more than 800,000 creators.

Under Mr. Mehra's leadership, Sonic AI has been recognized in various media outlets, including Business Leaders Today, Audio Ally, and The Urban Daily. The company's mission to democratize music creation and empower aspiring creators aligns perfectly with Mr. Mehra's passion for innovation and user-centric design.

Mr. Mehra's journey from OptiGaze to Streamify and now to Sonic AI exemplifies his unwavering commitment to pushing the boundaries of technology and creating meaningful user experiences. His ability to envision the future, build and motivate teams, and turn innovative ideas into tangible, market-leading products is truly remarkable.

In conclusion, Mr. Rajiv Mehra is an extraordinary entrepreneur and product manager whose contributions to the fields of AI music technology and multisensory user experiences have been nothing short of remarkable. His track record of innovation, leadership, and impact across multiple high-profile companies speaks volumes about his capabilities and potential.

I am confident that Mr. Mehra will continue to make significant contributions to the industry and drive meaningful advancements in technology and user experience. His unique blend of technical expertise, creative vision, and leadership acumen make him an invaluable asset to any organization or project he undertakes.

I wholeheartedly recommend Mr. Rajiv Mehra for the O-1 visa, as his extraordinary abilities and achievements clearly meet the criteria for this classification. His presence in the United States will undoubtedly benefit the tech industry and contribute to the development of cutting-edge solutions that will shape the future.

Thank you for considering my recommendation. Please feel free to contact me if you require any further information or clarification regarding Mr. Mehra's qualifications and contributions.

Sincerely,

Adrian McPherson
AR Experience Prototyper
Pear Inc.
adrian.mcpherson@gmail.com

Dear Sir or Madam:

I am writing this letter to provide my highest recommendation for Mr. Karthik Iyer. As someone who has had the opportunity to work closely with Mr. Iyer and observe his work firsthand, I am well-positioned to comment on his extraordinary expertise and remarkable contributions to the field of cybersecurity for generative AI applications. 

By way of introduction, I am a seasoned technology entrepreneur and investor with a robust background in machine learning, cloud data security, and optimization. I hold a PhD in Operations Research from the Massachusetts Institute of Technology, where my research focused on the design and analysis of loyalty reward programs. Prior to that, I earned a Master of Science in Management Science and Engineering, also from MIT, and a Bachelor of Technology in Computer Science and Engineering from the Indian Institute of Technology, Mumbai.

My professional experience includes founding Delta Innovations, a machine learning-powered cloud data security company, which was acquired by Silicon Valley Networks in 2021. Following the acquisition, I served as Vice President of Product for the Next-Gen CASB (Cloud Access Security Broker) at Silicon Valley Networks, where I led product development and integration efforts. Under my leadership, the business achieved a 3x growth within 18 months.

Currently, I am involved in various roles as a company builder, startup advisor, and angel investor. I work closely with early-stage startups, providing strategic insights on market entry, product-market fit, and go-to-market strategies. My technical expertise spans algorithms, machine learning, data analytics, and optimization, and I am proficient in programming languages such as Python and Java.

Throughout my career, I have been committed to advancing the field of technology through innovation and strategic leadership. My experience in founding and scaling successful technology ventures, combined with my academic background and technical skills, positions me well to evaluate and support individuals making significant contributions to the industry.

I first became acquainted with Mr. Iyer during his tenure at Silicon Valley Networks, where he served as a Senior Product Manager for Data Loss Prevention (DLP) from November 2021 to September 2023. In this role, Mr. Iyer was responsible for the API-based DLP product, a $50 million ARR (annual recurring revenue) solution with a mature install base of large enterprises. His leadership and strategic vision were instrumental in doubling the business to over $100 million in just two years. He also played a critical role in supporting top enterprise and government clients, helping them derive significant value from the DLP product.

One of Mr. Iyer's most notable achievements at Silicon Valley Networks was the successful integration of epsilon.ai, a $36 million acquisition, into the DLP product. This integration brought new real-time integrations and advanced detection capabilities to the DLP solution, significantly enhancing its value proposition and market competitiveness. Mr. Iyer's ability to seamlessly incorporate this acquisition into the existing product portfolio demonstrated his exceptional product management skills and deep understanding of the cybersecurity landscape.

Throughout his time at Silicon Valley Networks, Mr. Iyer consistently demonstrated a unique ability to identify market needs and develop innovative solutions that addressed those needs. His contributions were critical to the growth and success of the DLP product, and his expertise in data security and product management was widely recognized and respected within the organization.

My professional relationship with Mr. Iyer has since evolved, and I now serve as an advisor to his current venture, Nexus Security. In this capacity, I have had the opportunity to witness firsthand his continued growth and success as an entrepreneur and product leader. Mr. Iyer's ability to identify and address critical security challenges in the rapidly evolving field of generative AI applications is truly remarkable. He has demonstrated a deep understanding of the unique security requirements of AI systems and has developed innovative solutions that enable organizations to leverage the power of AI while ensuring data privacy and compliance.

As the Co-Founder and CEO of Nexus Security, Mr. Iyer has led the development of the company's flagship product, which secures data leakage on generative AI applications like ChatHub. Under his leadership, Nexus Security has raised nearly $4 million in seed funding from top-tier investors, including StartX, Fortune Capital, and other angel investors. The award-winning product is already in use by multiple top American enterprises working with sensitive data, underscoring the significant impact of Mr. Iyer's contributions to the field.

Mr. Iyer's ability to build and lead high-performing teams, combined with his deep technical expertise and strategic vision, has been instrumental in the success of Nexus Security. He has demonstrated a rare ability to translate complex technical concepts into practical solutions that address the real-world security challenges faced by organizations today. His passion for innovation and commitment to making AI safe for enterprise use have been truly inspiring, and I have no doubt that he will continue to make significant contributions to the field of cybersecurity for generative AI applications.

In conclusion, I am confident that Mr. Iyer's unique combination of technical expertise, strategic vision, and leadership skills will enable him to continue making significant contributions to the field of cybersecurity for generative AI applications. His work at Silicon Valley Networks and Nexus Security has already had a profound impact on the industry, and I have no doubt that he will continue to drive innovation and success in his future endeavors. I wholeheartedly recommend him for any opportunities that will allow him to further leverage his talents and expertise.

Please feel free to contact me if you require any further information. 

Sincerely, 

Amit Patel
Company Builder, Startup Advisor, and Angel Investor 
Email: amit.patel@gmail.com

Dear Officer:

I am writing to provide my strongest recommendation for Mr. Rohan Deshmukh, an extraordinary tech entrepreneur and product professional with whom I have had the pleasure of collaborating for over a decade. Mr. Deshmukh's remarkable blend of expertise in engineering and design, coupled with his visionary leadership, has consistently driven significant advancements in the fields of AI music technology and multisensory user experiences.

As for my background, I am a hands-on servant leader and versatile professional experienced in creating IP-led innovations, building high-performing teams, and solving challenges irrespective of technologies used. My focus is on making technology more human-centered, user-friendly, and accessible while driving meaningful business outcomes. I have extensive experience in strategic leadership, innovation, and team building across various industries. My roles have included Chief Design Officer and Founding Creative Leader at companies like Olin and Kulog, where I have been responsible for providing design direction and leadership for products and projects addressing both bottom-line and mainstream revenue.

I have been actively involved in mentorship and community engagement, serving as an Anchor Mentor at Particle for Startups since 2015, where I guide startups on UX/Design. I have also been a member of the IN+ Design jury and have mentored at Carnegie Capitol University, demonstrating my commitment to nurturing new talent and shaping the future of design and technology. My educational background includes a Bachelor's degree in Science from Maharana Pratap University, providing a solid academic foundation to my practical experience. I am fluent in English, Hindi, Marathi, and Konkani, which has enabled me to work effectively in diverse, multicultural environments.

I first met Mr. Deshmukh in 2012 when he was a Master of Design student at the National Institute of Technology Delhi (NIT Delhi). I was conducting a UX Design workshop as part of the Alpha Design Institute, and Mr. Deshmukh's exceptional creativity and technical acumen immediately stood out. Over the years, I have had the opportunity to observe his remarkable growth and contributions to the fields of AI music technology and multisensory user experiences.

Mr. Deshmukh's educational background is truly impressive. He holds a Master of Design (M.Des.) in Interaction Design from the National Institute of Technology Delhi (NIT Delhi), one of India's premier institutions. During his master's program, he also participated in a semester exchange at the Singapore University of Technology, where he further honed his skills in interaction design. Prior to that, he earned a Bachelor of Engineering (B.E.) in Information Technology from Gwalior Engineering College. This strong educational foundation has equipped him with a unique blend of technical and design expertise.

Mr. Deshmukh's professional journey is equally noteworthy. He is the Founder and CEO of HarmonyAI, a groundbreaking AI content creation platform that democratizes music and podcast production. This innovative platform leverages generative AI to help users easily translate their stories into musical realities, empowering aspiring creators worldwide. HarmonyAI has received significant media attention, with features in outlets such as Entrepreneurs Times, Music Weekly, and The Daily Journal. These publications have highlighted the platform's transformative impact on the music creation process and its potential to revolutionize the industry.

Prior to founding HarmonyAI, Mr. Deshmukh served as a Product Manager at Soundify in Stockholm, Sweden, from January 2020 to May 2023. In this role, he led the product strategy, roadmap, vision, and execution within Soundify's music creation business unit, Tunework. He worked with a cross-functional team of engineers, designers, researchers, and data scientists to build innovative music creation experiences. Notably, he transformed Tunework into a real-time collaboration app, resulting in a fourfold increase in studio collaboration time. He also crafted a product strategy to enhance communication for Gen Z users, which led to a 40% increase in user interaction with communication features and garnered 110 million press release impressions. His work was covered by major media outlets, including TechX and Soundify's official YouTube channel.

Before his tenure at Soundify, Mr. Deshmukh was a UX Designer at Orbital Tech in Stockholm, Sweden, from August 2017 to December 2019. At Orbital, he designed eye-tracking interactions for dual-display devices and identified opportunities for eye-tracking-based AR interactions, filing four patents and earning the Top Innovator award for Q1 2019. He also researched and designed smartphone interactions and visually aware voice assistants.

Earlier in his career, Mr. Deshmukh held roles at Simmtronics in Bengaluru, India, and Seoul, South Korea. As a Lead Designer from June 2016 to March 2017, he worked on the 'Remy' Voice Assistant, designing its personality and UX principles, identifying major use cases, and collaborating with field experts. His contributions were integral to the success of Remy, which boasts 10 million daily active users and is available on all Simmtronics products. As a Senior Designer from August 2014 to May 2016, he designed interaction paradigms for voice assistant-enabled wireless headphones, commercialized to flagship devices like the TuneMax X, and worked on projects involving sociable robots and foldable smartphones.

Mr. Deshmukh's contributions extend beyond his professional roles. He has been actively involved in academic and industry conferences, sharing his insights and research with the broader community. For instance, he presented his work at the Asia Pacific Conference on Human-Computer Interaction (APCHI) in 2013, where his project on "Mobile as a Shared Resource" was recognized as one of the top three designs. This project explored innovative ways to make mobile devices more collaborative and resourceful in shared environments, reflecting his early commitment to user-centered design and technology.

Moreover, Mr. Deshmukh has been a driving force in several innovative projects that have garnered significant recognition. His work on the "Interlink" project, which he undertook during his master's program at NIT Delhi, was done in collaboration with the Singapore University of Technology and Nanyang Polytechnic. This project, based on patented infraNet technology, focused on enabling remote participation and co-production of live events, addressing challenges such as mobility, costs, and accessibility. The "Interlink" platform crowdsourced content from participants, making it available to everyone and allowing users to interactively attend live events remotely.

Additionally, Mr. Deshmukh's "GeoTrack" project, developed as part of his academic work, received the Tata Pioneer Dot Award in 2013-14, recognizing it as one of the top 13 student startups in India for its social impact and potential in civic technology. "GeoTrack" was a platform designed to enhance public accountability and governance by fostering transparent communication between citizens and local authorities. Users could raise concerns about issues like potholes or power outages and track real-time updates on resolutions. The platform's innovative approach to civic engagement was also recognized with the Yahoo Innovation Derby 2014 Award in the "Digital Government" category.

These projects demonstrate Mr. Deshmukh's ability to tackle complex, real-world problems with innovative, user-centered solutions. His academic and professional achievements underscore his dedication to advancing technology in ways that are both practical and impactful, earning him recognition and respect in both academic and industry circles.

In conclusion, Mr. Rohan Deshmukh is an extraordinary tech entrepreneur and product professional whose remarkable blend of expertise in engineering and design, coupled with his visionary leadership, has consistently driven significant advancements in the fields of AI music technology and multisensory user experiences. His impressive educational background, extensive professional experience, and numerous contributions to both academia and industry underscore his dedication to advancing technology in meaningful and impactful ways. Mr. Deshmukh's ability to tackle complex, real-world problems with innovative, user-centered solutions has earned him recognition and respect across the globe. I have no doubt that he will continue to make significant contributions to the field and drive meaningful change in the years to come.

Sincerely,

Nina WilsonChief Design OfficerCognitive Factors Research & Design (CFR&D)nina.wilson@cfrd.co

Dear Sir or Madam:

I am writing this letter to confirm some facts about Mr. Rohan Verma's work, as well as to provide my perspective on his abilities and accomplishments. Having worked closely with Mr. Verma on several projects, I have had the opportunity to observe his expertise and skills firsthand.

By way of introduction, I am an HCI Research Scientist with a robust background in human-computer interaction (HCI), software development, and user experience design. I hold a PhD in Interactive Technology from Espoo University, where I focused on eye tracking and gaze-based HCI for wearables such as AR/VR devices. My academic credentials also include a Master’s degree in Human Technology Interaction from the University of Espoo and a Bachelor’s degree in Electronics and Instrumentation from the University of Mysore.

Throughout my career, I have gained extensive experience in both academic and industry settings. I currently serve as a Research Scientist at Ascension, a company dedicated to advancing the science of agents and multi-agent systems. Prior to this, I was a Senior User Experience Designer at Visionix in Helsinki, Finland, where I developed and evaluated concepts for visually aware computing devices, contributing to patents and thought leadership in the field. I also held research positions at the University of Espoo, working within the Visual Interaction Research Group (VIRG), and completed internships at Hewlett-Packard and TCS, where I applied my skills to projects in smart education and network management.

My contributions to the field of HCI are reflected in my extensive publication record, with over 30 peer-reviewed articles involving both quantitative and qualitative research methods. I have also been involved in patenting innovative technologies related to eye-tracking and user interaction. My skills span a wide range of areas, including user experience design, programming, data analysis, and rapid prototyping, enabling me to bridge the gap between research and practical application.

I first became acquainted with Mr. Verma during our time at Visionix, where we collaborated on multiple user experience (UX) and eye-tracking projects. At Visionix, we worked together to explore novel HCI solutions, file patents, and conduct research in the areas of AR/VR. One of the projects we collaborated on was the "Digital Assistant and Method for Voice-Based Interactive Communication Based on Detected User Gaze Indicating Attention" (Patent Number: 35281726). This invention pertains to a method for voice-based interactive communication using a digital assistant, which includes steps like attention detection, speaker detection, speech sound detection (including lip movement detection), speech analysis, and providing feedback based on recorded speech. The patent was filed on December 21, 2021, and granted on July 14, 2024, with Visionix AB as the assignee. Our collaboration on this project allowed me to observe Mr. Verma's innovative thinking and expertise in user experience design and eye-tracking technology.

Through our collaboration, I had the opportunity to observe Mr. Verma's expertise and skills firsthand. As a UX Designer at Visionix Technologies from August 2018 to December 2020, Mr. Verma made significant contributions to the development of eye-tracking technology and its applications. One of his notable achievements was his work on dual-display devices, where he designed eye-tracking based interactions for products like AMD Prism and Lenovo ScreenTouch. These innovations enhanced user experience by enabling more intuitive and efficient interactions with dual-display setups. Additionally, Mr. Verma conducted extensive AR UX research, identifying opportunities in eye-tracking based AR interactions. He prototyped these concepts and successfully filed four patents, showcasing his ability to translate research insights into practical solutions. His contributions were recognized by Visionix, as he was awarded the title of top innovator for Q1 2020.

Furthermore, Mr. Verma explored smartphone eye-tracking based interactions, researching and conceptualizing designs that leveraged eye-tracking technology to improve smartphone usability. He also identified opportunities for integrating eye-tracking into visually aware voice assistants, designing new experiences and interactions that made these systems more responsive and user-friendly. Mr. Verma's work at Visionix Technologies demonstrated his ability to push the boundaries of what eye-tracking technology could achieve, and his contributions have had a lasting impact on the field.

Prior to his role at Visionix, Mr. Verma gained valuable experience as a Lead Designer at LG Electronics from June 2017 to March 2018. In this position, he worked on several innovative projects, including the design of LG's Athena voice assistant. Mr. Verma played a crucial role in defining the personality and UX principles of Athena, identifying major use-cases and collaborating with field experts to create an intuitive and efficient interaction design. His contributions were instrumental in the successful launch of Athena, which achieved 12 million daily active users and was integrated into all LG products. Additionally, Mr. Verma worked on the interaction paradigm of hearables, designing voice assistant-enabled wireless headphones based on user research. His designs were commercialized into LG's flagship device, the Halo Buds. He also contributed to the development of a sociable robot, focusing on its personality, out-of-box experience (OOBE), adaptiveness, and multi-user scenarios, and identified key scenarios for a foldable smartphone, providing UX guidelines for its development. Mr. Verma's work at LG Electronics demonstrated his ability to design cutting-edge user experiences and his capacity to contribute to large-scale, innovative projects.

In addition to his significant contributions at Visionix and LG, Mr. Verma has also made remarkable strides as an entrepreneur and innovator. In June 2024, he founded Soundly AI, a state-of-the-art AI content creation platform that allows users to create music and podcasts with ease. Soundly uses generative AI to help users brainstorm and translate their stories into musical reality, with the mission to democratize music creation for all aspiring creators. The platform has already gained significant traction, with over 1.2 million songs generated by more than 850,000 creators. Soundly AI has been featured in various media outlets, including Creators Now, Rhythm Nexus, Acoustic, and The Urban Tribune, highlighting its impact on the music industry and its potential to revolutionize content creation.

Before founding Soundly AI, Mr. Verma served as a Product Manager at Tidal from January 2021 to May 2024. In this role, he led product strategy, roadmap, vision, and execution within Tidal's music creation business unit, HarmonyHub. Working with a cross-functional team of engineers, designers, researchers, and data scientists, he built innovative music creation experiences. One of his notable achievements was transforming HarmonyHub into a real-time collaboration app, which led to a fourfold increase in studio collaboration time. He also crafted a product strategy to help Gen Z users achieve easier and contextual communication by building the "Chatter" feature, resulting in a 40% increase in user interaction with communication features. Mr. Verma's work at Tidal was widely recognized, with his contributions being featured in media outlets such as CrunchTech and Tidal's official YouTube channel.

Mr. Verma's diverse experiences, from leading design initiatives at major tech companies like LG and Visionix to founding an innovative AI platform, demonstrate his ability to drive technological advancements and create impactful user experiences. His work has consistently pushed the boundaries of what is possible in the fields of AI, AR, and music technology, and his contributions continue to shape the future of these industries.

In conclusion, Mr. Rohan Verma's extensive experience, innovative mindset, and proven track record of success make him a standout figure in the fields of AI, AR, and music technology. His ability to translate complex ideas into practical solutions, coupled with his passion for democratizing content creation, positions him as a leader who is poised to make significant contributions to the tech and creative industries. I am confident that Mr. Verma will continue to drive innovation and create transformative user experiences in his future endeavors.

If you require any additional information or clarification, please feel free to contact me at your convenience.

Sincerely,
Naveen Kapur, PhD
HCI Research Scientist
Ascension
naveen.kapur@asc.com

To Whom It May Concern:


I am writing to confirm the significant contributions of Mr. Rajiv Patel to the FLOSS (Free/Libre and Open Source Software for Education) initiative at Imperial College London. As a contributor to the project, I had the opportunity to witness Mr. Patel's work firsthand and can attest to the impact of his contributions.


By way of background, I am currently a Network Infrastructure professional at Horizon Technologies, based in Palo Alto, California. Since joining Horizon in June 2019, I have advanced from a Software Engineer to my current role, where I focus on the company's network infrastructure. My work involves developing and maintaining the systems that underpin Horizon's vast array of services, ensuring their reliability, scalability, and performance.


Prior to my tenure at Horizon, I gained valuable experience in the tech industry through roles at other leading companies. From June 2016 to July 2017, I worked as a Software Engineer at InnovateX in Bengaluru, India, where I contributed to various projects and honed my skills in software development and engineering. Additionally, I completed a summer internship at GraphixTech in San Jose, California, from May 2018 to August 2018. During this internship, I worked on projects related to high-performance computing and gained insights into the cutting-edge technologies that drive GraphixTech's innovations.


My educational background includes a Master of Science in Computer Science from the University of Michigan, which I completed in January 2019. During my time at the university, I served as a Graduate Research Assistant at the Distributed Systems Lab under the guidance of Prof. Benjamin Lee. This experience allowed me to engage in advanced research and further develop my expertise in computer science. Prior to that, I earned a Bachelor of Technology in Computer Science Engineering from the Delhi Institute of Technology, where I graduated as a Gold Medalist, reflecting my strong academic performance and dedication to the field.


Through my professional and academic experiences, I have developed a deep understanding of the skills and qualities required to excel in the tech industry. This background enables me to recognize and appreciate the significant contributions and potential of individuals like Mr. Rajiv Patel.


During his tenure with the FLOSS initiative at Imperial College London, Mr. Patel led the design and implementation of innovative open-source tools aimed at transforming engineering education and research. His primary focus was on developing robust, scalable, and cost-effective solutions that could serve as alternatives to expensive proprietary software, thereby increasing accessibility for academic institutions worldwide.


One of Mr. Patel's key achievements was the conceptualization and development of Bridger, an open-source visual programming editor. Inspired by Berkeley's Snap!, Bridger allows users to seamlessly integrate SciPy libraries into Python workflows. This tool serves as a powerful substitute for proprietary software like Simulink, enabling scalable simulations, driver integration, and cross-platform functionality, including support for RISC architectures. Bridger's simplicity and extensibility laid the foundation for a wide range of control system developments within the open-source ecosystem.


In addition to Bridger, Mr. Patel made significant enhancements to Open Signal, an open-source software development toolkit for signal processing. Collaborating with international experts, he worked to eliminate critical limitations in Open Signal by utilizing the FLOW framework for bi-directional data flow and real-time feedback handling. He also successfully integrated ECHODRIVERS, improving connectivity with diverse hardware and extending Open Signal's application scope in academic and industrial control systems.


Mr. Patel's contributions extended to remote lab experiments and protocol design as well. He created a novel URL-based communication protocol that enabled remote access to physical lab experiments, significantly reducing geographic and economic barriers to lab-based education. This innovation helped institutions share laboratory resources more efficiently, supporting the National Mission on Education through ICT by making lab experiences universally accessible.


Throughout his work with FLOSS, Mr. Patel demonstrated a strong commitment to technical excellence and open-source community building. He devised and validated Python-based SciPy functions for advanced system modeling and real-time feedback in control experiments. He also ensured seamless integration among SciPy, NumPy, and Python, facilitating broader adoption in engineering curricula. Furthermore, he engaged the global control systems community through workshops, documentation, and collaborative initiatives that promoted continuous feedback and improvement.


In recognition of his groundbreaking work, Mr. Patel received the highest grade (AA) from Imperial College London for his master's thesis, reflecting its exceptional quality and contribution to open-source control engineering tools. His efforts laid the groundwork for ongoing open-source advancements in universities and research labs, significantly lowering barriers to innovation and expanding opportunities for academic and industrial stakeholders.


In conclusion, Mr. Rajiv Patel's contributions to the FLOSS initiative at Imperial College London have had a profound impact on the field of engineering education and research. His innovative open-source tools and commitment to community building have significantly advanced the accessibility and effectiveness of engineering curricula worldwide. I am confident that Mr. Patel will continue to make significant contributions to the field of technology and innovation in the future.


Sincerely,



Amit Deshmukh
Network Infrastructure
Horizon Technologies

As part of the Griffin Institutes, the Master of Biotechnology Program benefits from access to state-of-the-art facilities, resources, and expertise.

The board provides valuable insights and guidance on the latest trends and developments in the biotech sector, helping to ensure that our program remains aligned with the needs of the industry. The Biotechnology Advisory Board at Elmwood State University is a prestigious and exclusive membership program that selects highly qualified and experienced individuals from the biotechnology industry to support the education and entrepreneurial endeavors of students and faculty.
